text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fatigue has gotten the better of Sakura Bakushin
O, so I tell her to get some rest in the infirmary.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Rest is also one of the duties of a model student!
Okay! Goodnight!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Wh-where on earth am I?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Wow! Look, look! It's Sakura Bakushin O!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
It's a chance to introduce ourselves! Class Rep!
Good morning!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Ooh?! Such a lovely greeting! Good morning,
everyone!

text_block_list.name: Foreign Prime Minister
text_block_list.text:
Sakura Bakushin O, your brilliance is well-known
even in my homeland!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Wow! You're that super important famous foreign
prime minister that often appears on TV, right?!

text_block_list.name: Foreign King
text_block_list.text:
You are so wonderful! All our citizens do
Bakushins to follow in your footsteps!

text_block_list.name: Alien
text_block_list.text: гҖҮвҳҶвҖ»пјҒв–  @ ; ;~~?! вҷӘ вҖ»в–іпјҠпј пјҶпј…вҳҶ#~~!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Heh... Of course, Mr, Alien. After all, I...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I am indeed the model student of this world! The
class representative of the Milky Way! Sakura
Bakushin O!

text_block_list.name: Everyone
text_block_list.text: YEEAH! BAKUSHIN O! BAKUSHIN O!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
All right, everyone! Righteousness! Justice!
Bakushin, BAKUSHIIIN!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Gasp! It was just a dream?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
But to be a class representative idolized as a role
model worldwide...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: It's definitely a vision of the future!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sakura Bakushin O wakes up in a great mood. It
appears she got more than enough rest.

text_block_list.name: Foreign Prime Minister
text_block_list.text:
...It's a shame, but there is another person better
suited to being class representative than you.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Wha... What did you say?!

text_block_list.name: Foreign King
text_block_list.text:
Indeed... they have my vote as well. I wish you
luck in the next election.

text_block_list.name: Alien
text_block_list.text: вҖ»Г—пј в– гҖҮпҪһ... Well, I guess that's that. See you!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Huh, a dream?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Argh! I have to work even harder and become a
better class representative!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Unfortunately, Sakura Bakushin O's tense dream
prevents her from getting much rest.
